# Backordered Items

In the event that an item in your order is backordered at Acme Shop, you will be notified via email with an estimated restock date. While we strive to minimize backorders due to high demand or supply chain issues, customers can opt to wait for the item or cancel it for a full refund without extra fees. In-stock items will be shipped immediately, and backordered items will be sent separately once available, with no additional shipping costs. If a backordered item has not shipped within 30 days of its estimated restock date, customers may be eligible for compensation or discounts on future purchases.

[Source: order_management.md#backordered-items]
